inputs.label: Roof Width (m)
inputs.businessContext: The total horizontal width of the roof area to be covered.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total horizontal width of the roof area to be covered.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaplanacak çatı alanının toplam yatay genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte horizontale Breite der zu bedeckenden Dachfläche.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La largeur horizontale totale de la zone de toiture à couvrir.
businessContext_i18n.es: El ancho horizontal total del área del techo a cubrir.

inputs.label: Roof Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: The length of the roof slope from ridge to eave.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of the roof slope from ridge to eave.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahyadan saçaklara kadar çatı eğiminin uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Länge der Dachneigung vom First bis zur Traufe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur de la pente du toit du faîte à l'avant-toit.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud de la pendiente del techo desde la cumbrera hasta el alero.

inputs.label: Sheet Effective Width (m)
inputs.businessContext: The coverage width of one sheet after accounting for side overlap.

businessContext_i18n.en: The coverage width of one sheet after accounting for side overlap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yan bindirme payı düşüldükten sonra bir levhanın kaplama genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Deckbreite einer Platte nach Berücksichtigung der Seitenüberlappung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La largeur de couverture d'une tôle après prise en compte du recouvrement latéral.
businessContext_i18n.es: El ancho de cobertura de una lámina después de considerar el traslape lateral.

inputs.label: Sheet Length (m)
inputs.businessContext: The length of a single corrugated sheet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of a single corrugated sheet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur d'une seule tôle ondulée.
businessContext_i18n.es: La longitud de una sola lámina corrugada.

inputs.label: End Overlap (m)
inputs.businessContext: The lengthwise overlap between sheets to ensure watertightness.

businessContext_i18n.en: The lengthwise overlap between sheets to ensure watertightness.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Su geçirmezliği sağlamak için levhalar arasındaki boyuna bindirme.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Längsüberlappung zwischen Platten zur Sicherstellung der Wasserdichtigkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le recouvrement longitudinal entre les tôles pour assurer l'étanchéité.
businessContext_i18n.es: El traslape longitudinal entre láminas para asegurar la estanqueidad.

inputs.label: Price per Sheet
inputs.businessContext: Cost of one sheet in local currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of one sheet in local currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel para biriminde bir levhanın maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten einer Platte in lokaler Währung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût d'une tôle en devise locale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo de una lámina en moneda local.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
